evidence: Real libupb validation confirmed the signed truncation in _upb_DescState_Grow(). With a logical pointer delta of 2147483679 bytes, the function computed truncated_used_32=-2147483617, returned success, and skipped a required realloc. A follow-on library write then produced an ASan fatal write in upb_MtDataEncoder_PutRaw from the compiled libupb artifact. The trigger uses a crafted internal upb_DescState that simulates the >INT_MAX scratch-buffer condition described by the finding.
